name: Chocolate Meringue Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat margarine, sugars, egg yolks, and 1 tsp. vanilla in a bowl until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, mix dry ingredients: baking powder, baking soda, salt.
3. Add the dry mixture to the margarine mixture with milk or water, stirring until combined.
4. Spread the batter evenly into a 9" x 13" pan.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the batter.
6. Beat egg whites to soft peaks. Gradually add brown sugar and vanilla, beating until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold in nuts (if using) into the egg white mixture.
8. Spread the meringue mixture carefully over the chocolate chips.
9. Bake at 325°F for 30-35 minutes or until set.
